mission.title: n8n: PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up
mission.description: PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up. This issue affects 9+ users.

steps.title: Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review n8n configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n
```
### Bug Description

I'm experiencing an issue when attempting to parse the PDF file (email attachment) using the `Extract From File` node to convert it to text, I get a `DOMMatrix is not defined` error.

steps.title: Apply the fix for PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up
steps.description:
Hi there 👋

I’m running into the exact same issue as described in issue #16281. I started using n8n for the first time, eager to follow along with tutorials, and immediately hit this “DOMMatrix is not defined” error when using the **Extract From File** node on PDFs (using Docker images version
```yaml
jq 'del(.pnpm.patchedDependencies)' package.json > package.json.tmp; mv package.json.tmp package.json
```

steps.title: Upgrade n8n to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade n8n:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade n8n n8n/n8n --namespace n8n
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n
helm list -n n8n
```

steps.title: Confirm PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Hi there 👋

I’m running into the exact same issue as described in issue #16281. I started using n8n for the first time, eager to follow along with tutorials, and immediately hit this “DOMMatrix is not defined” error when using the **Extract From File** node on PDFs (using Docker images version 1.97.1+).
codeSnippets: jq 'del(.pnpm.patchedDependencies)' package.json > package.json.tmp; mv package.json.tmp package.json

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with n8n installed or the issue environment reproducible.
